title: thelypteris regis
intro: Thelypteris regis, also known as the Royal Maiden's Hair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris regis include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be dried and made into a tea, or used in tinctures and infusions to extract its medicinal compounds.
